ocr_findings.description: Ruby phonetic annotations (エイディエムアイ above HDMI, ブルートゥース above Bluetooth, アールエフアイティ above RFID) captured as separate plain-text lines rather than inline ruby — content preserved but formatting differs from image
Section markers '0●' used instead of '○●' for HDMI/Bluetooth/RFID headers — zero vs circle, cosmetic only

reviewer_notes: Lesson 11-06 入出力インタフェース continuation page. HDMI, Bluetooth, and RFID sections all captured with correct technical descriptions. The photo of USB and HDMI connectors is noted as two image placeholders with labels. Key exam phrases ('映像、音声及び制御信号を1本のケーブルで入出力するAV機器向けのインタフェース', '近距離間（数m）でデータをやり取りする無線インタフェース') fully preserved.
